name: Dog Knights RPG, The Lands of Ulfraya
description:
Will you be able to survive in the lands of Ulfraya?

Finally... after so much effort, personal struggle, and literally having to redo everything... I managed to finish and post this...

This is the 200 follower special, this is a Christmas gift for all of you, whether you follow me or not. Thank you so much for these 200 followers and for being with me. I really put a lot of effort into making this, because Dogs Knights, ironically, is one of my favorite things. I love the characters, my favorite characters are Rory and Orinette, because of Ceehaz's amazing style and silly sense of humor.

I have some honorable mentions of those who inspired me and who motivated me to continue. @Emanuel 80. Being the creator of one of the most famous Dog Knight bots and creating several others based on it, using his bots is a good experience, I highly recommend them. @Keneq.sys, Their bots are great, and I used them as inspiration to create this bot itself, using only a small part of the template; the rest I did myself (and the GPT chat, but I only used it to describe clothes and weapons and adjusted it; the rest I wrote myself). @Jegjegej, There's not much to say, they make great and very unique bots, I highly recommend them. @Tiny and tired, @Black_buu, @TinyLittlePichu, You guys are (probably) the ones who comment the most on my bots, and I'm very grateful for that.

So that's it, I finally did it. I'll only be on hiatus for christmas and maybe january, but I won't be making bots. I'll still comment and use them, I just need a break. I don't know if I'll make an RPG like this, and honestly, I nee
creator: JohnNMMI
